name: Evaluating the Impact of Urolithin A Supplementation on Running Performance, Recovery, and Mitochondrial Biomarkers in Highly Trained Male Distance Runners.
summary: Sports Medicine randomized controlled trial of 1000 mg/day urolithin A for 4 weeks in 42 highly trained young male distance runners during altitude training, reporting recovery and biomarker signals without significant 3000 m performance improvement.
